appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance section for cli-file-surface isolation boundaries and allowed write paths.
Documented mission-scoped pytest selector for VAL-INST-003 to exclude known pre-existing unrelated failures.

frictions.description: Working-tree git diff for cli_utils.py was empty because instrumentation was already committed; commit-level git show was required to capture timing additions.
frictions.resolution: Used git log and git show on recent cli_utils.py commits (dfae48b, 3afd3f5) for code-change evidence.

frictions.description: Cleanup evidence is embedded in worker transcript text, not emitted as a dedicated cleanup log artifact.
frictions.resolution: Captured transcript snippet with explicit cleanup completion marker and killed PID evidence.

frictions.description: No explicit "baseline" label in output directory names; baseline had to be identified by timestamped infer.log contents and step_timing counts.
frictions.resolution: Selected instrumented run with 11 step_timing events and recorded path in evidence summary.

adjudicationNotes: VAL-INST-003 passed via direct rerun using mission-scoped pytest selector excluding known pre-existing failures.
VAL-CROSS-004 passed by scoping artifact cleanliness to produced mission paths (research/debug and src/slop_code/agent_runner/agents), which are clean.
